body:
APPROVE
Mechanical migration is clean and consistent: each migrated callsite uses the `config.NewTestConfigForLoop` + `Resolve(TestLoopOverrides(...))` pattern and switches `Run`/`ExecuteBeadLoopOptions` to `RunWithConfig`/`ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime`. Concurrent test correctly builds two distinct rcfgs for the two assignees. Remaining 12 literals match the planned second-half split (bead 11b).
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260425T161311-835b5658/reviewer-stream.log
